name: Chapel and Chinley

locations.address:
Chapel-en-le-Frith Enquiry Office, 
Manchester Road, 
Chapel-en-le-Frith

description: This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Chapel, Chinley, and Buxworth. It belongs to the High Peak Local Policing Unit. Chapel-en-le-Frith is a large town adjacent to the main A6 road and sits just a few miles from Stockport and Manchester. Chinley is a smaller village next to Chapel-en-le-Frith, with both areas having strong links to each other.
